tool_definitions.name: notebook_read
tool_definitions.description: Read a Jupyter notebook (.ipynb) and return a summary of its cells: type, source, output count, and execution count.

tool_definitions.name: notebook_add_cell
tool_definitions.description: Add a new cell (code, markdown, or raw) to a Jupyter notebook at the given index. If index is omitted or out of range, appends to the end.

steps.message: Use the notebook_add_cell tool to add a new code cell with source "print('added by golden query')" at index 1 in the notebook at "/tmp/koi-golden-notebook-1775628921644.ipynb". Then use notebook_read to confirm the cell count increased to 4.
